rulings.Case Title: MOAB INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. COURTHOUSE VENTURES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Order In Compliance With Courts Prior Order And Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF MOAB INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Order In Compliance With Courts Prior Order And Proof Of Service GRANTED as requested with the following modification: "Receiver may hire existing brokers/agents to proceed with the marketing of the property and may entertain existing offers." = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LORI G. PERRY ET AL VS. RONALD G. GAGGERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT RONALD GAGGERO, JACQUELINE GAGGERO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint GRANTED. Paragraph 19(v), appearing on page 5, lines 26 through 28, is irrelevant, improper, and is stricken from the complaint. The Court also notes that the current complaint may constitute a violation of San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.10B. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is granted. No opposition to Judicial Notice. Plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition to the Court. (San Francisco Local Rule, Rule 2.7(B).) = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MU KESH PATEL VS. SURESH HAMMER KHATRI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Recall Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT SURESH KHATTRI Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Recall Writ Of Possession GRANTED under CCP § 473(b), subject to Defendant filing an answer by 2:00 p.m. on June 19, 2019 and posting one months' rent with the Court by 5:00 p.m. on June 28, 2019. Attorney's fees are DENIED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CROSBY APARTMENTS, LP VS. JOSH LAMBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT JOSH LAMPERT MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, subject to Defendant filing an answer by 2:00 p.m. on June 19, 2019 and posting $6,936.75 with the Court by 5:00 p.m. on June 28, 2019. The amount reflects the back rent due from January to June, including an offset of $638.96 remitted to the Court for the two Sheriff lock-out stays. In the event of a judgment in favor of Defendant, Defendant will be required to pay his back rent, subject to any reduction for his habitability claims. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ATALEN, LLC VS. JACKIE LONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT JACKIE LONG MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED, subject to opposition. This Motion is premature. Plaintiff has not filed a Proof of Service claiming proper service has been made. = (501/CFH)
